definition: Not feeling glad or pleased.
sentence_context: He was unhappy that it was raining.

definition: To take something again.
sentence_context: I had to retake the photo.

definition: To not like something.
sentence_context: I dislike eating broccoli.

definition: To heat before using.
sentence_context: Preheat the oven to 350 degrees.

definition: A wrong step or mistake.
sentence_context: One misstep caused him to fall.

definition: Full of hope.
sentence_context: I am hopeful that we will win.

definition: In a fast manner.
sentence_context: He ran quickly to catch the bus.

definition: Not giving enough attention.
sentence_context: A careless mistake cost him the game.

definition: In a slow manner.
sentence_context: The turtle moved slowly across the road.

definition: Without fear; brave.
sentence_context: The fearless knight faced the dragon.

definition: A mark or shape that has a particular meaning.
sentence_context: The stop sign is red.

definition: The joint connecting the hand and the arm.
sentence_context: He wore a watch on his wrist.

definition: The joint between the thigh and the lower leg.
sentence_context: I scraped my knee when I fell.

definition: A tool with a sharp blade used for cutting.
sentence_context: Be careful when using a sharp knife.

definition: To hit a door with your hand to get attention.
sentence_context: Please knock before entering the room.

definition: To mark letters or words on paper with a pen.
sentence_context: I need to write a thank-you note.

definition: The spirit of a dead person.
sentence_context: The ghost haunted the old castle.

definition: A very small piece of bread or cake.
sentence_context: A crumb fell onto the tablecloth.

definition: A plastic tool with teeth used to tidy hair.
sentence_context: I use a comb to part my hair.

definition: The short thick finger on the side of the hand.
sentence_context: He hurt his thumb with the hammer.

definition: To build something again.
sentence_context: They had to rebuild the barn.

definition: Not having good luck.
sentence_context: It was unlucky to lose his keys.

definition: To put in the wrong place.
sentence_context: Don't misplace your homework.

definition: A ship that can go under water.
sentence_context: The submarine dove deep into the ocean.

definition: To pay for something in advance.
sentence_context: You must prepay for your ticket.

definition: To fail to obey an order.
sentence_context: You should never disobey the safety rules.

definition: To open a lock.
sentence_context: Use the key to unlock the front door.

definition: To write something again.
sentence_context: The teacher asked me to rewrite my essay.

definition: An opportunity to see something before it is public.
sentence_context: We saw a preview of the new movie.

definition: Past tense of mistake.
sentence_context: I mistook her for her twin sister.

definition: In a cautious manner.
sentence_context: Walk carefully on the ice.

definition: Feeling afraid.
sentence_context: The child was fearful of the dark.

definition: Pleasing to the senses.
sentence_context: What a beautiful sunset!

definition: Not the same.
sentence_context: They wore different colored shirts.

definition: The group of people who rule a country.
sentence_context: The government made a new law.

definition: A sweet food made from cacao beans.
sentence_context: I love eating dark chocolate.

definition: A chart showing the days of the year.
sentence_context: Check the calendar for the date.

definition: The work of buying and selling.
sentence_context: My father owns a small business.

definition: A place where books are kept.
sentence_context: I borrowed this book from the library.

definition: A large natural elevation of the earth.
sentence_context: We hiked up the steep mountain trail.
